title: Officials to drivers during World Cup: Stay away
author: Beth Treffeisen
bullets: Local News MassDOT is warning drivers to avoid the roads during match days and to utilize public transportation as much as possible.
Traffic slowly crawls across the Foxborough town line headed towards Gillette Stadium before a pre-season Patriots game.

(Aram Boghosian for The Boston Globe) World Cup On Monday, the Massachusetts Department of Transportation launched a statewide campaign called “Kick the Drive” to reduce traffic and keep people moving during the seven FIFA World Cup matches taking place this summer.

title: Photos: Beyoncé, Bad Bunny, and Janelle Monáe take artistic liberties with Met Gala dress code
author: The Associated Press
bullets: Celebs Beyoncé.

ANGELA WEISS / AFP via Getty Images NEW YORK (AP) — Met Gala guests from Beyoncé and Naomi Osaka to Emma Chamberlain did not play it safe this year for the Met Gala, delivering custom works of art in honor of the dress code “Fashion is art.
”Beyoncé left the cowboy hat at home and dazzled in a custom Olivier Rousteing sculptural skeleton dress with a cream and dust blue feathered train fitted with a diamond crown for “Queen Bey.

title: Child dies after tree topples on Melrose playground
author: Abby Patkin
bullets: Local News Two students and an adult were injured when a tree fell on the elementary school playground Monday.
A Melrose student has died after a tree toppled on an elementary school playground Monday, injuring the child and two more people.

“We are deeply saddened to share the heartbreaking news that a student who was severely injured in yesterday’s accident at the Winthrop Elementary School has passed away,” Melrose Mayor Jen Grigoraitis and Superintendent Cari Berman said in a joint statement.

title: Police searching for Mattapan woman who went missing after leaving hospital
author: Samantha Genzer
bullets: Local News Authorities describe Brittany Binger, 29, as a Black female, approximately 5 feet tall and 140 pounds, with a medium build, brown eyes, and black curly hair.
Brittany Binger, 29, of Mattapan, is reporting missing.
Courtesy of Boston Police Department Police are searching for a Mattapan woman who went missing over the weekend.

title: 4 offseason priorities for the Bruins after first-round loss to Sabres
author: Conor Ryan
bullets: Boston Bruins The Bruins need another high-end forward and some stability on the blue line if they want to take another step forward in 2026-27.
Marco Sturm and the Bruins have some work to do if they want to take another step forward in 2026-27.
(Photo by: Barry Chin/Globe Staff).

title: Suspect arrested, another still at large in Holyoke killing
author: Carson Lyle
bullets: Crime Delani Rodriguez, 21, is charged with murder and is currently being held without bail, prosecuters said.
A Holyoke woman was arrested in connection to the fatal shooting of a man last month, while her boyfriend remains at large, prosecutors said.
Delani Rodriguez, 21, is charged with murder for the fatal shooting of Robert Abreu, 31, on April 18, court documents show.

title: Bill Simmons: Celtics coach Joe Mazzulla ‘screwed this series up’ vs. Sixers
author: Conor Ryan
bullets: Boston Celtics "Did Philly win this series or did Boston blow it?
I think the answer is both.
" Bill Simmons wasn't thrilled with Joe Mazzulla's approach during the playoffs.

title: Red Sox’ Roman Anthony leaves game in 2nd inning due to right wrist discomfort
author: Conor Ryan
bullets: Boston Red Sox Anthony was replaced by Masataka Yoshida in left field after appearing to hurt his wrist on a check swing.
Roman Anthony exited Monday's game in the second inning.
David Berding / Getty The hits keep on coming for the Red Sox.

title: Stephen A. Smith rips Jaylen Brown’s Twitch comments as ‘awful look’
author: Conor Ryan
bullets: Boston Celtics “[Flopping] is not why the Boston Celtics lost.
The Boston Celtics lost because they lived and died with the three, because they played dumb basketball down the stretch.
" Stephen A.
